drl:
rule "R0"
when
    ( T2($b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f2) and T3(f1 > $b0_0_1) )
    or
    ( T2($b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f2) and T3(f1 > $b0_0_1) )
then
end
rule "R1"
salience -7
when
    ( $p1_0 : T2($b1_0_0 : f0) )
    or
    ( $p1_0 : T2($b1_0_0 : f0) )
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insertLogical(new T3("", $p1_0.getF2(), $p1_0.isF0()));
    insertLogical(new T3("alpha", $p1_0.getF2(), $b1_0_0));
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T0($b2_0_0 : f2)
then
    delete($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
agenda-group "gb"
when
    accumulate( T0($s3_0 : f2); $a3_0 : min($s3_0) )
then
end
